differentials.name: Bezoar (in gastrectomized patient) mnemonic:   VA BADD TU BADD child adult
differentials.raw: Bezoar (in gastrectomized patient) mnemonic:   VA BADD TU BADD child adult

context: Abdominal plain film: √  "double-bubble" sign = air-fluid levels in stomach + duodenum √  frequently normal ← absence of gas from vomiting Jejunal and Ileal Obstruction =  SMALL BOWEL OBSTRUCTION (SBO) Frequency:   accounts for 20% of all surgical admissions Mortality:  5.5% due to strangulation (paradigm: "Never let the sun rise or set on an obstructed small bowel") Cause:
